/usr/bin/c++ -g -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/elcmd.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/elcmd.dir/elcmd_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/elcmd.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/elcmd.dir/src/PaneWidget.cpp.o CMakeFiles/elcmd.dir/src/ArchiveViewerDialog.cpp.o CMakeFiles/elcmd.dir/src/ConflictDialog.cpp.o -o elcmd  /usr/lib64/libQt6Widgets.so.6.10.2 libcore.a /usr/lib64/libQt6Gui.so.6.10.2 /usr/lib64/libGLX.so /usr/lib64/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib64/libQt6Concurrent.so.6.10.2 /usr/lib64/libQt6Core.so.6.10.2
